hero.tagline: We cultivate trust... and export excellence.
hero.sub: A leading company with experience since 2000 in processing and exporting the finest Egyptian agricultural products. We are proud of our partnership with over 30 global importers in 15 countries, committed to the highest international standards of purity and quality.

about.heroDesc: A journey of excellence from the land to the world

story.title: Our Story: From the Land to the World
story.text1: Our journey began in 2000, when our fathers laid the foundation for the agricultural produce trade within the Egyptian market. Over two decades, our expertise grew and our relationships with the finest farms expanded, leading us in 2020 to take a strategic step by founding ALRAED CROPS as a specialized entity in processing and export.
story.text2: We were not just seeking expansion, but bringing Egyptian quality to global tables. Therefore, we built an integrated system that supervises every grain of crop; from supply, through cleaning and automated sorting, to professional packaging that matches international market standards.
story.text3: Today, we are proud to be not just exporters, but partners in success with over 30 international importers in more than 15 countries around the world, offering a diverse list of more than 25 super-quality agricultural products.

items.ar: الانطلاقة الأولى في السوق المحلي وبناء شبكة الموردين والمزارع.
items.en: Initial launch in local market, building supplier & farm network.
items.fr: Lancement initial sur le marché local, construction d'un réseau de fournisseurs et d'exploitations.

items.ar: التأسيس الرسمي لشركة الماسة والتحول نحو التصدير المباشر.
items.en: Official founding of ALRAED CROPS, transition to direct export.
items.fr: Fondation officielle d'ALRAED CROPS, transition vers l'exportation directe.

items.ar: التوسع العالمي والوصول إلى 15 دولة بـ 25 منتجاً مختلفاً.
items.en: Global expansion: reached 15 countries with 25 different products.
items.fr: Expansion mondiale : atteinte de 15 pays avec 25 produits différents.

items.ar: المشاركة الفعالة في معرض Food Africa، لتعزيز تواجدنا في قلب خارطة الغذاء العالمية.
items.en: Active participation in Food Africa to strengthen our presence at the heart of the global food map.
items.fr: Participation active à Food Africa pour renforcer notre présence au cœur de la carte alimentaire mondiale.
